exception_description: Two service accounts identified without MFA enforcement during Q1 access review. Accounts had console access enabled.
management_response: Management has disabled console access for both service accounts and implemented a detective control to alert on any future service account console logins.

exception_description: One terminated employee's access was deprovisioned 3 days after termination rather than on the last day of employment. Access during the gap was reviewed and no unauthorized activity was detected.
management_response: Termination checklist updated to require same-day IAM deprovisioning sign-off. HR system now triggers automated deprovisioning ticket on last day of employment.

exception_title: Legacy firewall rule permitting broad inbound access
exception_description: A legacy firewall rule was identified permitting broad inbound access on port 443 from an unrestricted IP range. Rule dated from a prior project and was not removed during offboarding.
management_response: Legacy rule removed. Firewall rule review process updated to include quarterly review of all inbound rules with aging rules flagged for justification or removal.

exception_description: One emergency change ticket reviewed lacked a documented rollback plan. Change was implemented successfully but rollback procedures were not documented prior to implementation.
management_response: Change management policy updated to require rollback plan documentation even for emergency changes. CAB approval template updated to include mandatory rollback plan field.

exception_description: Two vendors were identified as overdue for annual security reassessment by 30 or more days. Both vendors have access to non-public data.
management_response: Overdue assessments completed within 15 days of identification. Vendor risk calendar updated with automated reminders at 60 and 30 days prior to reassessment due date.

exception_title: Overly broad role with access to confidential data
exception_description: One IAM role was identified with read access to a confidential data store broader than required for its function. Role was used by a reporting service.
management_response: Role permissions scoped to specific data paths required for the reporting function. Principle of least privilege review scheduled for all data-access roles in Q2.

exception_description: One third-party vendor was found to have an expired NDA. Vendor has ongoing access to non-public information under an active contract.
management_response: Updated NDA executed with vendor within 5 business days. NDA renewal process added to annual vendor review calendar.
